entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `icon` TEXT NOT NULL, `color` INTEGER NOT NULL, `label` TEXT, `tracking_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `visualization_type` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PIXEL_GRID', `unit` TEXT, `target_value` REAL, `checkpoint_steps` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `frequency` TEXT NOT NULL, `schedule_days` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_archived` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminder_enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminder_time` TEXT, `reminder_days` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sort_order` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `auto_track_source` TEXT, `geofence_enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `outdoor_activity` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `habit_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `value` REAL, `latitude` REAL, `longitude` REAL, `note` TEXT, `category` TEXT, `skipped` INTEGER NOT NULL, `missed_reason` TEXT, `stress_level` INTEGER, `energy_level` INTEGER, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `auto_logged` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `auto_track_source` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`habit_id`) REFERENCES `habits`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )
